name: Momento
description: Momento — Serverless cache and pub/sub service with per-request pricing and sub-millisecond latency.

seo.title: Momento — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Momento: Momento — Serverless cache and pub/sub service with per-request pricing and sub-millisecond latency.

when_to_use: Serverless cache with per-request pricing, no cluster management
Sub-millisecond cache for edge functions with global replication
Serverless pub/sub for real-time app events without brokers
Replacing Elasticache with zero-ops managed cache service
Cache layer for Lambda functions with automatic expiry

pros: True serverless cache with zero provisioning
cons: Newer player with smaller track record
Cost can surprise at high request volumes
review.verdict: The cleanest serverless cache experience if you hate managing Redis, watch per-request costs.
review.best_for: Serverless apps wanting cache and pub/sub without provisioning Redis clusters
review.not_for: High-volume workloads where predictable reserved Redis pricing wins

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
